accumulation_distribution_line.formula: ADL(i,t) = cumulative_sum((((C(i,t) - L(i,t)) - (H(i,t) - C(i,t))) / (H(i,t) - L(i,t))) * VOL(i,t))

cost_moving_average_10.formula: AMV10(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-9), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-9), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_120.formula: AMV120(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-119), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-119), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_20.formula: AMV20(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-19), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-19), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_250.formula: AMV250(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-249), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-249), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_3.formula: AMV3(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-2), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-2), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_30.formula: AMV30(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-29), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-29), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_5.formula: AMV5(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-4), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-4), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_55.formula: AMV55(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-54), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-54), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

cost_moving_average_60.formula: AMV60(i,t) = SUM(AMOV(i,t-59), ..., AMOV(i,t)) / SUM(VOL(i,t-59), ..., VOL(i,t)), AMOV=VOL*(O+C)/2

consecutive_down_days.formula: 若 C(i,t) < C(i,t-1)，则 DOWNDAYS(i,t) = DOWNDAYS(i,t-1) + 1，否则为 0

consecutive_up_days.formula: 若 C(i,t) > C(i,t-1)，则 UPDAYS(i,t) = UPDAYS(i,t-1) + 1，否则为 0

kaufman_adaptive_moving_average_10_2_30.formula: KAMA(10,2,30)(i,t) = adaptive moving average of C(i,t) with ER window 10, fast=2, slow=30

on_balance_volume.formula: OBV(i,t) 按收盘涨跌方向对成交量进行累计加减

stochastic_fast_d_line_5_3.formula: FASTD(i,t) = MA(FASTK(i,t), 3), FASTK 基于 5 日最高最低区间

stochastic_relative_strength_index_fast_.formula: STOCHRSI_FASTD(i,t) = MA(STOCHRSI_FASTK(i,t), 3), STOCHRSI_FASTK 基于 14 日 RSI 的 5 日随机化
